# spatialreg

### spatialreg: spatial models estimation and testing

A collection of all the estimation functions for spatial cross-sectional
models (on lattice/areal data using spatial weights matrices) contained
up to now in **spdep**. These model fitting functions include maximum
likelihood methods for cross-sectional models proposed by Cliff and Ord
(1973, ISBN: 0850860369) and (1981, ISBN: 0850860814), fitting methods
initially described by Ord (1975)
<https://doi.org/10.1080/01621459.1975.10480272>. The models are further
described by Anselin (1988) <https://doi.org/10.1007/978-94-015-7799-1>.
Spatial two stage least squares and spatial general method of moment
models initially proposed by Kelejian and Prucha (1998)
<https://doi.org/10.1023/A:1007707430416> and (1999)
<https://doi.org/10.1111/1468-2354.00027> are provided. Impact methods
and MCMC fitting methods proposed by LeSage and Pace (2009)
<https://doi.org/10.1201/9781420064254> are implemented for the family
of cross-sectional spatial regression models. Methods for fitting the
log determinant term in maximum likelihood and MCMC fitting are compared
by Bivand et al. (2013) <https://doi.org/10.1111/gean.12008>, and model
fitting methods by Bivand and Piras (2015)
<https://doi.org/10.18637/jss.v063.i18>; both of these articles include
extensive lists of references. A recent review is provided by Bivand,
Millo and Piras (2021) <https://doi.org/10.3390/math9111276>.
**spatialreg** \>= 1.1-1 corresponds to **spdep** = 1.1-1, in which the
model fitting functions are deprecated and pass through to
**spatialreg**, but will mask those in **spatialreg**. From versions
1.2-1, the functions have been made defunct in **spdep**. From version
1.3-6, add Anselin-Kelejian (1997) test to `stsls` for residual spatial
autocorrelation <https://doi.org/10.1177/016001769702000109>.

Default branch now `main`.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`GMerrorsar()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/GMerrorsar.md)
  [`summary(`*`<Gmsar>`*`)`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/GMerrorsar.md)
  [`GMargminImage()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/GMerrorsar.md)
  : Spatial simultaneous autoregressive error model estimation by GMM
- [`MCMCsamp()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/MCMCsamp.md)
  : MCMC sample from fitted spatial regression
- [`ME()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/ME.md) :
  Moran eigenvector GLM filtering
- [`lagsarlm()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/ML_models.md)
  [`errorsarlm()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/ML_models.md)
  [`sacsarlm()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/ML_models.md)
  [`summary(`*`<Sarlm>`*`)`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/ML_models.md)
  [`print(`*`<Sarlm>`*`)`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/ML_models.md)
  [`print(`*`<summary.Sarlm>`*`)`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/ML_models.md)
  [`residuals(`*`<Sarlm>`*`)`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/ML_models.md)
  [`deviance(`*`<Sarlm>`*`)`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/ML_models.md)
  [`coef(`*`<Sarlm>`*`)`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/ML_models.md)
  [`vcov(`*`<Sarlm>`*`)`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/ML_models.md)
  [`fitted(`*`<Sarlm>`*`)`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/ML_models.md)
  [`nobs(`*`<Sarlm>`*`)`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/ML_models.md)
  [`set_coef(`*`<Sarlm>`*`)`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/ML_models.md)
  : Spatial simultaneous autoregressive model estimation by maximum
  likelihood
- [`spBreg_lag()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/SET_MCMC.md)
  [`spBreg_sac()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/SET_MCMC.md)
  [`spBreg_err()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/SET_MCMC.md)
  [`impacts(`*`<MCMC_sar_G>`*`)`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/SET_MCMC.md)
  [`impacts(`*`<MCMC_sem_G>`*`)`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/SET_MCMC.md)
  [`impacts(`*`<MCMC_sac_G>`*`)`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/SET_MCMC.md)
  : Bayesian MCMC spatial simultaneous autoregressive model estimation
- [`lmSLX()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/SLX.md)
  [`print(`*`<SlX>`*`)`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/SLX.md)
  [`summary(`*`<SlX>`*`)`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/SLX.md)
  [`print(`*`<summary.SlX>`*`)`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/SLX.md)
  [`impacts(`*`<SlX>`*`)`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/SLX.md)
  [`print(`*`<WXimpact>`*`)`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/SLX.md)
  [`summary(`*`<WXimpact>`*`)`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/SLX.md)
  [`predict(`*`<SlX>`*`)`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/SLX.md)
  [`create_WX()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/SLX.md)
  : Spatial Durbin linear (SLX, spatially lagged X) model
- [`SpatialFiltering()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/SpatialFiltering.md)
  : Semi-parametric spatial filtering
- [`aple()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/aple.md) :
  Approximate profile-likelihood estimator (APLE)
- [`aple.mc()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/aple.mc.md)
  : Approximate profile-likelihood estimator (APLE) permutation test
- [`aple.plot()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/aple.plot.md)
  [`localAple()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/aple.plot.md)
  : Approximate profile-likelihood estimator (APLE) scatterplot
- [`do_ldet()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/do_ldet.md)
  [`jacobianSetup()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/do_ldet.md)
  [`cheb_setup()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/do_ldet.md)
  [`mcdet_setup()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/do_ldet.md)
  [`eigen_setup()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/do_ldet.md)
  [`eigen_pre_setup()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/do_ldet.md)
  [`spam_setup()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/do_ldet.md)
  [`spam_update_setup()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/do_ldet.md)
  [`Matrix_setup()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/do_ldet.md)
  [`Matrix_J_setup()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/do_ldet.md)
  [`LU_setup()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/do_ldet.md)
  [`LU_prepermutate_setup()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/do_ldet.md)
  [`moments_setup()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/do_ldet.md)
  [`SE_classic_setup()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/do_ldet.md)
  [`SE_whichMin_setup()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/do_ldet.md)
  [`SE_interp_setup()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/do_ldet.md)
  [`can.be.simmed()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/do_ldet.md)
  : Spatial regression model Jacobian computations
- [`eigenw()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/eigenw.md)
  [`griffith_sone()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/eigenw.md)
  [`subgraph_eigenw()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/eigenw.md)
  : Spatial weights matrix eigenvalues
- [`gstsls()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/gstsls.md)
  [`impacts(`*`<Gmsar>`*`)`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/gstsls.md)
  : Spatial simultaneous autoregressive SAC model estimation by GMM
- [`plot(`*`<LagImpact>`*`)`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/impacts.md)
  [`print(`*`<LagImpact>`*`)`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/impacts.md)
  [`summary(`*`<LagImpact>`*`)`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/impacts.md)
  [`HPDinterval(`*`<LagImpact>`*`)`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/impacts.md)
  [`intImpacts()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/impacts.md)
  : Impacts in spatial lag models
- [`invIrM()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/invIrM.md)
  [`invIrW()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/invIrM.md)
  : Compute SAR generating operator
- [`lagmess()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/lagmess.md)
  : Matrix exponential spatial lag model
- [`lextrB()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/lextrB.md)
  [`lextrW()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/lextrB.md)
  [`lextrS()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/lextrB.md)
  [`l_max()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/lextrB.md)
  : Find extreme eigenvalues of binary symmetric spatial weights
- [`predict(`*`<Sarlm>`*`)`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/predict.sarlm.md)
  [`print(`*`<Sarlm.pred>`*`)`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/predict.sarlm.md)
  [`as.data.frame(`*`<Sarlm.pred>`*`)`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/predict.sarlm.md)
  : Prediction for spatial simultaneous autoregressive linear model
  objects
- [`LR.Sarlm()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/sarlm_tests.md)
  [`logLik(`*`<Sarlm>`*`)`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/sarlm_tests.md)
  [`LR1.Sarlm()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/sarlm_tests.md)
  [`Wald1.Sarlm()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/sarlm_tests.md)
  [`Hausman.test(`*`<Sarlm>`*`)`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/sarlm_tests.md)
  [`anova(`*`<Sarlm>`*`)`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/sarlm_tests.md)
  [`bptest.Sarlm()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/sarlm_tests.md)
  [`impacts(`*`<Sarlm>`*`)`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/sarlm_tests.md)
  : Likelihood ratio test
- [`set.mcOption()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/set.mcOption.md)
  [`get.mcOption()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/set.mcOption.md)
  [`set.coresOption()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/set.mcOption.md)
  [`get.coresOption()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/set.mcOption.md)
  [`set.ClusterOption()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/set.mcOption.md)
  [`get.ClusterOption()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/set.mcOption.md)
  : Options for parallel support
- [`set.VerboseOption()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/set.spChkOption.md)
  [`get.VerboseOption()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/set.spChkOption.md)
  [`set.ZeroPolicyOption()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/set.spChkOption.md)
  [`get.ZeroPolicyOption()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/set.spChkOption.md)
  : Control checking of spatial object IDs
- [`similar.listw()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/similar.listw.md)
  : Create symmetric similar weights lists
- [`as.spam.listw()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/sparse_mat.md)
  [`listw2U_spam()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/sparse_mat.md)
  [`listw2U_Matrix()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/sparse_mat.md)
  [`as_dgRMatrix_listw()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/sparse_mat.md)
  [`as_dsTMatrix_listw()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/sparse_mat.md)
  [`as_dsCMatrix_I()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/sparse_mat.md)
  [`as_dsCMatrix_IrW()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/sparse_mat.md)
  [`Jacobian_W()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/sparse_mat.md)
  [`powerWeights()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/sparse_mat.md)
  : Spatial neighbour sparse representation
- [`spautolm()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/spautolm.md)
  [`summary(`*`<Spautolm>`*`)`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/spautolm.md)
  : Spatial conditional and simultaneous autoregression model estimation
- [`stsls()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/stsls.md)
  [`impacts(`*`<Stsls>`*`)`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/stsls.md)
  : Generalized spatial two stage least squares
- [`trW()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/trW.md)
  [`mom_calc()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/trW.md)
  [`mom_calc_int2()`](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/reference/trW.md)
  : Spatial weights matrix powers traces

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [Spatial weights objects as sparse matrices and
  graphs](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/articles/nb_igraph.md):
- [North Carolina SIDS data set
  (models)](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/articles/sids_models.md):
- [Moran
  Eigenvectors](https://r-spatial.github.io/spatialreg/articles/SpatialFiltering.md):
